text:
There once was a sweet little girl named Iris. She loved butterflies. Every evening, she'd watch them dance around her sleepy garden. One day, she saw something strange.

A butterfly fluttered down toward her bookshelf. Something like aowl followed it.

"I think one wants me!"

She thought so too! So she took it home and fed her mocha cocoa.

That's how owlberry grove began!

Now sometimes she'd find just owlberries. But she found something much bigger!

A bird feather!

So she bought an owl perch.

Now everything sits just right.

I think you know my little owl dear.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
